title: 菊花賞の後に・King of Games

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We have ourselves a new Triple Crown champion,
folks! Let's hear it for the victor of the Satsuki
Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur! She's carved her name into the annals
of history as a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm a Triple Crown champion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Amazing... So this is how influential the title is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If dreams alone could change anything, don't you
think that would've happened already?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should just give up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(If I knew things'd turn out this way, I never
would've said that stuff, even as a joke.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So this is how it feels.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Didja hear? I'm a Triple Crown champion now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The title doesn't suit me one bit.
...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: HELL YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hahaha!
Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she's laughing her head off... That must mean...
she's happy, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Beats me... But what are we going to do about the
interview? She's the Triple Crown champion, so we
definitely need a word or two from her...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I really am a Triple Crown champion... Haha,
hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Reporters A & B
text_block_list.text: I don't want to get near her right now...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The Triple Crown... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time all the post-race hubbub has settled
down, Air Shakur is her usual level-headed self
again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now we can finally decide the agenda for my
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep the spring Tenno Sho and the
Takarazuka Kinen as my goal races. Let's start
there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm gonna head down the optimal route
that Parcae calculated for me—the one where
every race ended in utter defeat.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, I'm going to take on the hardest race
schedule this country has to offer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But if my fate's changed, then maybe the results
have changed too. I need to crunch the numbers
again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This year's Japan Cup should be good too. It'll
have senior-year runners, so it'll be a decent
reference for what's to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is one of the most popular G1
races, and Umamusume from abroad are also
invited to compete. But what I really want to
know is...
choice_data_list: What place did Parcae predict you would get?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: 14th. Practically dead last.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That was the hand I was dealt and the fate I was
destined to follow... Up until now, anyway.
choice_data_list: But that's all changed, so surely—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but that doesn't mean things're all good
now. For starters, I don't even know why Parcae
predicted I would lose that badly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But like I said, I'm gonna challenge myself to take
on the ultimate race schedule.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that means goin' against some real
monsters. Especially considering this year's
contenders... Anyway, that's a conversation for
later.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run the calculations again on my break
and make a new training schedule based on the
results.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Look over it for me after I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as we're about to part ways, I overhear a
conversation from a nearby table.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the Kikuka Sho had me on the edge of my
seat the whole time! And they even crowned a
Triple Crown champion to boot.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea Air Shakur was that talented. I was
always too distracted by her obnoxious behavior
and appearance to really notice.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
But forget about that. We've got the autumn
Tenno Sho to look forward to! Do you think
Opera O has it in the bag?

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
You bet! She's ridiculously strong! We've got to
grab some good seats to watch her win it!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What are you doin'? Are you staying here?
choice_data_list: I'm coming! Just tidying up our table.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, the Kikuka Sho quickly falls out of
the spotlight. It's hard not to be bothered by how
fast people are moving on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Just when did my fate change, exactly? Was it
during my debut race? No, that's not it.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(It must've happened earlier than that. But the
only unexpected thing that happened at that
stage was signing the trainer contract... Could
that be it?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: To just show up and act like you can change things! So go ahead... tell me how it'll be different with you!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Did that idiot actually save me? Gimme a break...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Still... At the end of the day, I couldn't do it on
my own.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Next thing you know, I'm gonna start thinking
this is some kinda conspiracy, like maybe this is
all scripted and it never mattered what I want.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. I've come this far... Who cares if
it's a fluke or not?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make next year my era, whether anyone likes it or not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting home, I reflect back on Air Shakur's
performance today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had an overwhelming presence and powerful
strides. She was practically glowing on the track...
But the most impressive thing was her
determination to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first, I would've been content to see her
overcome her fate and win. But now, I want more.
choice_data_list: (I want more people to know about her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And not just people these days. I want people
who don't even know about racing yet to learn
about her and love her.
choice_data_list:
(I want her name to make it into the history
books.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's the desire that's taken root inside me.
